title: Suspects at large after business robbery in the CBD
bodyText:
GEORGE NEWS - George detectives are investigating a business robbery following an incident at a restaurant in Meade Street on Saturday 25 May at about 23:00.


> According to Southern Cape police spokesperson Sgt Chris Spies, it is alleged that four men, of which three were carrying firearms, entered the business.


"They forced personnel to two safes on site and demanded cash. The suspects took an undisclosed amount of money and fled the scene. No arrests have been made," said Spies.

Anyone with information is asked to contact the investigating officer WO Francois Kleyn on 044 803 4715 or Crime Stop at 08600 10111. All information will be treated confidentially.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
